items.title: 10-year Treasury yield rises to highest since January 2025 as surging oil rekindles inflation fear
items.description: U.S. Treasury yields climbed on Wednesday, following oil prices higher, as traders also reacted to a slump in weekly claims for unemployment insurance.

items.title: Trump says Saudi nuclear deal contingent on relations with Israel, does not include enrichment
items.description: The civilian nuclear cooperation agreement, signed Wednesday, will be sent to Congress for review, the Department of Energy said.

items.title: Southwest Airlines' third-quarter forecast falls short as fuel bill climbs
items.description: Southwest Airlines reported a more than 9% increase in second-quarter profit as higher fares are increasingly helping the airline cover its fuel tab.

items.title: American Airlines slashes 2026 earnings outlook as fuel costs spike
items.description: American Airlines further cut its 2026 earnings outlook, citing higher fuel costs.

items.title: Comcast earnings highlight NBCUniversal strength ahead of planned split
items.description: Comcast said earlier this year it would split the cable businesses from the media business, creating two separate publicly traded companies.

items.title: UniCredit CEO tells CNBC acquisition of Commerzbank could happen in fourth quarter
items.description: UniCredit CEO Andrea Orcel told CNBC Thursday that the Italian bank could "potentially" acquire Commerzbank in the fourth quarter.

items.title: Trump says U.S. will hold Iran responsible for Houthi attacks after oil tankers targeted in Red Sea
items.description: Yemen's Houthis said they had targeted two Saudi oil tankers with drones and missiles for allegedly violating its maritime blockade.

items.title: AARP to Congress: 'We strongly object to fast-tracking Social Security changes'
items.description: New legislation aims to break the stalemate on overhauling Social Security. AARP, which advocates on senior issues, says it opposes them.

items.title: Cyclospora outbreak tests RFK Jr.'s promise to overhaul food system, rebuild trust in CDC
items.description: Cyclospora presents a test for HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s promise to overhaul the food system and restore confidence in the agencies overseeing it.

items.title: Russia’s Amazon-style retail giant Wildberries is now in Ukraine’s crosshairs. Here's why
items.description: Ukraine has ratcheted up its attacks on Russia's Amazon-style retail giant Wildberries, signaling a new phase in the war.

items.title: Ozempic face? Botox boom boosted by 'sagging face' trend, Swiss firm says
items.description: The aestetics company hope increased GLP-1 use will fuel demand for treatments addressing facial volume loss, sometimes dubbed "Ozempic face."

items.title: China's Geely to make EVs at Ford plant in Spain under new joint venture
items.description: Ford and Geely plan for the joint venture will begin operations in the first half of 2027, with the first new vehicles scheduled to roll off the line in 2028.

items.title: A tax break for preserving land has drawn IRS scrutiny. Here’s when it still makes sense
items.description: For wealthy landowners, conservation easements can still make sense if you avoid these IRS red flags.

items.title: Senate panel advances China auto bill that could bar Mercedes-Benz from U.S.
items.description: Mercedes-Benz’s largest individual shareholder is Chinese state-owned BAIC. Cruz warned the bill could hurt Mercedes and accused GM of backing it.

items.title: Moonshot AI accessed Nvidia's chips despite Chinese export ban, White House official says
items.description: A White House official said Moonshot AI, which released the powerful Kimi K3 model last week, accessed Nvidia's GB300 chips in Thailand.

items.title: IRS chief Frank Bisignano may have misled Congress, Democrats say
items.description: The IRS alone hemorrhaged more than 31,000 employees as of January in President Trump's government cuts, according to the agency's inspector general.

items.title: Google slapped with $1 billion fine under landmark EU digital law
items.description: European regulators fined Google 890 million euros ($1 billion) alleging the company gives preferential treatment to its own services.

items.title: Eli Lilly says it will file for approval of next-generation obesity drug in 2027 as it clears two more trials
items.description: There are now positive results from five late-stage trials on retatrutide, which Lilly is positioning as the next pillar of its obesity portfolio.

items.title: Hedge funds circle UK stocks as new PM Andy Burnham pledges 'new economic model'
items.description: Prime Minister Andy Burnham's overhaul of Britain's domestic policy could fuel a range of trading opportunities in U.K. stocks.

items.title: Silver and gold prices stage a cautious rebound — but analysts see slim hopes for a sustained rally
items.description: Precious metals have rallied in recent days, but analysts say prices could face a difficult path back to all-time highs achieved earlier this year.
